name: Part.PartAttributes
summary: The PartAttributes class is the attributes class for the part.

constructors.name: Part.PartAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default part attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Part.PartAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new part attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: CenterLine
properties.summary: The line type of the center line.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the object type

properties.name: DrawCenterLine
properties.summary: True if the center line is drawn.

properties.name: DrawChamfers
properties.summary: True if chamfers are drawn.

properties.name: DrawConnectingSideMarks
properties.summary: True if connecting side marks are drawn.

properties.name: DrawHiddenLines
properties.summary: True if hidden lines are drawn.

properties.name: DrawOrientationMark
properties.summary: True if the orientation mark is drawn.

properties.name: DrawOwnHiddenLines
properties.summary: True if own hidden lines are drawn.

properties.name: DrawPopMarks
properties.summary: True if pop marks are drawn.

properties.name: DrawReferenceLine
properties.summary: True if the reference line is drawn.

properties.name: FaceHatch
properties.summary: The hatch type of the face hatch.

properties.name: HiddenLines
properties.summary: The line type of hidden lines.

properties.name: OwnHiddenLines
properties.summary: The line type of own hidden lines.

properties.name: PartialProfileLength
properties.summary: Gets or sets the partial profile length.

properties.name: PartialProfileOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the partial profile offset.

properties.name: ReferenceLine
properties.summary: The line type of the reference line.

properties.name: Representation
properties.summary: The representation of the part.

properties.name: SectionFaceHatch
properties.summary: The hatch type of the section face hatch.

properties.name: SectionLines
properties.summary: The line type of section lines.

properties.name: SymbolOffset
properties.summary: The symbol offset.

properties.name: VisibleLines
properties.summary: The line type of visible lines.
